name: Elevated Advisory Group
description: Elevated Advisory Group is a cannabis industry consulting firm specializing in extraction and manufacturing lab design, license application support, operational analysis, retail consulting, cultivation advisory, staffing, expert witness services, and analytical lab services. EAG operates internationally with managing partners Michael Maibach, Patrick King, and Casey Boone.

name: Elevated Advisory Group — Cannabis Consulting
description: Cannabis industry consulting firm offering extraction facility design, license applications, operational auditing, retail consulting, cultivation advisory, expert witness services, and analytical lab services.
